steps.title: Distribute the outside factor
steps.content:
Multiply $5xy$ by each term inside the parentheses. The outside factor must multiply both terms, including each coefficient and each variable power:
$$5xy(3x^2)=15x^3y$$
$$5xy(4y)=20xy^2$$

steps.title: Match the equivalent form
steps.content: The equivalent expression keeps both the coefficients and variable powers from the distribution. The answer is D.
